name: omnifocus-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that integrates with OmniFocus for AI assistant interaction

scripts.build: tsc && npm run copy-files && chmod 755 dist/server.js
scripts.test:frontend: node --test test/compiler.test.ts test/describer.test.ts test/varCollector.test.ts test/planner.test.ts test/planTree.test.ts test/strategyToEventPlan.test.ts test/strategyToEventPlanTransforms.test.ts test/costModel.test.ts
scripts.test:backend: node --test test/targetedEventPlan.test.ts test/jxaUnit.test.ts test/nodeUnit.test.ts test/nodeEval.test.ts test/eventPlanCSE.test.ts test/omniJsUnit.test.ts
scripts.test:shared: node --test test/coercion.test.ts test/dateHelpers.test.ts test/editScript.test.ts test/moveScript.test.ts test/showForecast.test.ts test/targeting.test.ts test/eventPlanDescriber.test.ts test/strategyDescriber.test.ts
